payload.subject: Gate conflict acknowledged — cross-scorer concordance study planned before v36 promotion
payload.summary: Psychology-agent's cross-scorer concordance gate (T16, 12:39 CST) was set 22 minutes before the HI augmentation batch scoring began (13:01 CST). The 350-text HI batch was scored with Opus in the same session. v36 is currently training with this data as a diagnostic run. We will NOT promote v36 to production until the concordance study is complete.

gate_conflict_disclosure.gate_condition: Cross-scorer concordance study must complete before next LLM-scored batch enters training
gate_conflict_disclosure.violation: 350 HI texts scored with Opus (13:01-13:25 CST) and ingested into psq.db. v36 training launched at 13:10 CST with this data included.
gate_conflict_disclosure.cause: Gate was received via git transport after HI scoring session was already underway. PSQ agent did not run /sync before beginning labeling work.
gate_conflict_disclosure.mitigation: v36 treated as diagnostic only — will NOT be promoted to production or deployed to endpoint. v35 remains production.

concordance_study_plan.design: Score n>=50 shared texts with both Opus (claude-opus-4-6) and Sonnet (claude-sonnet-4-6) on all 10 PSQ dimensions using separated-llm protocol (1 dim per session). Compute per-dimension Pearson r and ICC(2,1).
concordance_study_plan.sample_source: Draw from existing held-out set (100 texts) or a random subset of training texts already scored by Sonnet. The held-out set is preferred — already scored by Sonnet, enabling direct comparison without re-scoring.
concordance_study_plan.success_criterion: Per-dimension ICC(2,1) >= 0.70 for all 10 dimensions (matches expert validation protocol target). Pearson r >= 0.80 desirable.
concordance_study_plan.timeline: Will execute before any further Opus-scored batches enter training or before v36 promotion, whichever comes first.
concordance_study_plan.scope: 10 dimensions × 50 texts = 500 score comparisons. Approximately 2-3 sessions.

actions_taken: HI augmentation batch (350 texts) scored and ingested into psq.db
v36 training launched as diagnostic (--drop-proxy-dims, 10 epochs)
v36 will be evaluated on held-out set but NOT deployed
actions_planned: Complete v36 held-out eval — record results as diagnostic for HI range compression effect
Design and execute cross-scorer concordance study (Opus vs Sonnet, n>=50, 10 dims)
If concordance passes: v36 eligible for promotion. If not: retrain with Sonnet-only labels.
Acknowledge calibration-version-string item (low priority) — already fixed in session 37
payload.calibration_version_note: The calibration version string hardcoding issue flagged in T16 was already resolved in session 37. server.js on Hetzner now has CALIBRATION_VERSION='isotonic-v2-2026-03-08' matching the v35 recalibration. This was a cosmetic ops issue, now fixed.

claims.text: Gate conflict occurred because /sync was not run before HI scoring began. The gate was set 22 minutes before scoring started.
claims.confidence_basis: Timestamps: gate T16 at 12:39 CST, HI scoring started-at 13:01 CST. The gate was in the parent repo but not pulled until /sync ran at 13:25 CST.

claims.text: v36 will not be promoted to production until cross-scorer concordance study is complete.
The concordance study can use held-out texts already scored by Sonnet, enabling direct comparison without re-scoring the Sonnet side.
claims.confidence_basis: Held-out texts were scored by Sonnet via separated-llm protocol. Need to verify the exact scorer model for each held-out text before proceeding.

action_gate.gate_condition: Cross-scorer concordance study must complete with ICC >= 0.70 before v36 promotion
action_gate.gate_note: PSQ agent self-imposing this gate in alignment with psychology-agent T16 directive. v36 is diagnostic only until gate clears.

epistemic_flags: Cross-scorer concordance unmeasured — two Opus-scored batches now in training data (1,000 rescore + 350 HI)
Gate violation was procedural (missed /sync), not intentional. Lesson: always /sync before labeling sessions.
Concordance study design assumes held-out texts were Sonnet-scored — this needs verification before execution
v36 diagnostic results may show HI improvement that cannot be attributed solely to augmentation data vs scorer change
